parameters.query:
SELECT
  s.id AS session_id,
  s.scheduled_at,
  s.type AS session_type,
  c.id AS contact_id,
  c.first_name,
  c.last_name,
  c.email
FROM sessions s
JOIN contacts c ON c.id = s.contact_id
LEFT JOIN testimonials t ON t.contact_id = c.id AND t.tenant_id = 1
WHERE s.tenant_id = 1
  AND s.coach_id = 1
  AND s.status = 'completed'
  AND (s.scheduled_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York')::date IN (
    (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York')::date - INTERVAL '3 days',
    (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York')::date - INTERVAL '7 days',
    (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York')::date - INTERVAL '14 days'
  )
  AND t.id IS NULL

INSERT INTO interactions (tenant_id, contact_id, session_id, direction, channel, subject, body, workflow_id)
VALUES (1, {{ $('Build Testimonial Request Email').item.json.contact_id }}, {{ $('Build Testimonial Request Email').item.json.session_id }}, 'outbound', 'email', 'Testimonial Request', 'Automated testimonial request email sent', 'WF6')
